title: Reference Document D001
text: A retail bank CRM assistant should use the latest source of truth from product policy documents and fee schedules. Personal data fields must be masked before external model calls.

title: Reference Document D002
text: Mortgage prepayment penalties depend on product type, fixed-rate period, and local regulation. Waivers may apply for hardship cases approved by credit risk.

title: Reference Document D003
text: For Singapore savings accounts, fall-below fees depend on average daily balance and customer segment. Some premium segments are exempt.

title: Reference Document D004
text: KYC refresh is required every 12 months for high-risk customers and every 36 months for standard-risk retail customers, unless a trigger event occurs earlier.

title: Reference Document D005
text: A transaction monitoring alert may be escalated when pattern scores exceed threshold, when sanctions-related entities are detected, or when structuring behavior is observed across linked accounts.

title: Reference Document D006
text: SME lending decisions typically combine bureau signals, cashflow trends, collateral coverage, and sector outlook. Recent delinquency often materially increases risk.

title: Reference Document D007
text: For card disputes, provisional credit may be issued after intake if required evidence is received and fraud indicators are not contradictory. Chargeback windows vary by network.

title: Reference Document D008
text: RAG systems often improve retrieval quality by tuning chunk size, overlap, metadata enrichment, hybrid retrieval, reranking, and query rewriting before generation.

title: Reference Document D009
text: In evaluation datasets, the relevant context should be compared with retrieved passages. Final answers should be compared with reference answers using exact match and semantic similarity where appropriate.

title: Reference Document D010
text: When no reference answer exists, evaluation should emphasize retrieval coverage, citation quality, answer groundedness, and model-based pairwise judgment with human spot checks.
